description: Mirror of BT-1425 (AI 엔터프라이즈 커스텀 Mk.V) — Seed C INDEPENDENT deployment_manifold axis import into anima Mk.X. Seed C subsumption drill placed BT-1421/22/23/24/26/27/28 inside L_IX = T − V_struct − V_sync − V_RG + λ·I_irr, but BT-1425's market/economic axis is orthogonal to L_IX (technical Lagrangian) and must be imported as a new Mk.X term: L_X = L_IX + μ·D(deployment_manifold). Source of truth: n6-architecture repo; consumed by anima roadmap #65.

axis_imported.name: deployment_manifold
axis_imported.nature: market / economic axis — enterprise customization throughput
axis_imported.reason_independent: Not absorbed by L_IX. L_IX encodes technical Lagrangian (kinetic + structural + sync + RG + irreversibility). Market saturation limit is orthogonal: economic / contractual / deployment-scale dimension.
axis_imported.orthogonality_claim: D ⊥ L_IX under raw#30 projection — varying μ in L_X = L_IX + μ·D leaves L_IX stationary fixpoint S_IX invariant.
axis_imported.mk_x_term_candidate: L_X = L_IX + μ·D(deployment_manifold)  (+ ν·C(macro_coarse_grain) + ρ·N(novelty), other Mk.X candidate terms per edu/README exp2-lix-5term)

dimensions.adapter_orthogonality: J₂=24 slots mutually orthogonal → zero customer interference → unbounded horizontal scale

mk_x_promotion_criterion.verbatim: Mk.X T10-13 spec 에 deployment_manifold axis 선언 + BT-1425 시장 포화 limit (CIRCUMVENT grade) mirror + L_IX 와 orthogonality 증명 + shared/config/alm_r13_fellows_bt_mapping.json BT-1425 엔트리 reach

decomposed.claim: deployment_manifold axis declared in Mk.X T10-13 spec

decomposed.claim: BT-1425 시장 포화 limit (CIRCUMVENT grade) mirrored

decomposed.artifact: tool/bt1425_deployment_manifold_selftest.hexa check c5 (D-axis degrees-of-freedom 288 mod J₂=0) + check c4 (axis separation: D-axis uses σ·φ=J₂=24 only, no overlap with L_IX V_RG/V_sync which use λ·I_irr sign convention)
config/alm_r13_fellows_bt_mapping.json line 13 (BT-1425 엔터프라이즈 커스텀 / 시장 포화 / CIRCUMVENT / 30 ideas / persona category) + line 24 (persona → BT-1425 primary)

deployment_manifold_identities.sigma_phi_eq_n_tau: 12 × 2 = 6 × 4 = 24 (Jordan J₂ identity — adapter orthogonal slot count)

breakthrough_grade.mechanism: σ(6)=12 vertical templates × J₂=24 orthogonal adapter slots = 288 unique configurations → finite-vertical / infinite-customer combinatorial explosion
breakthrough_grade.verbatim_from_source: CIRCUMVENT — 시장 포화 한계를 J₂=24 직교 슬롯 구조로 우회. 유한 수직 템플릿(σ=12)이 무한 고객 조합을 생성하는 완전수 조합론적 폭발 활용.

independence_rationale.subsumption_lagrangian: L_IX = T − V_struct − V_sync − V_RG + λ·I_irr
independence_rationale.why_bt1425_independent: BT-1425 operates on market / enterprise customization axis, not on L_IX's physical-Lagrangian terms. Its grade (CIRCUMVENT via J₂=24 orthogonal slots) is the economic analogue of raw#30 orthogonal projection — the limit is saturated on a different manifold entirely.

consumer.roadmap_name: BT-1425 deployment manifold 축 수입 (Mk.X) — Seed C INDEPENDENT
